members.name: AddVisibilityFilter
members.summary: Adds a peer visibility filter for this synchronizer. [param filter] should take a peer ID [int] and return a [bool].

members.name: GetVisibilityFor
members.summary: Queries the current visibility for peer [param peer].

members.name: RemoveVisibilityFilter
members.summary: Removes a peer visibility filter from this synchronizer.

members.name: SetVisibilityFor
members.signature: public void SetVisibilityFor(int peer, bool visible)
members.summary: Sets the visibility of [param peer] to [param visible]. If [param peer] is [code]0[/code], the value of [member public_visibility] will be updated instead.

members.name: UpdateVisibility
members.summary: Updates the visibility of [param for_peer] according to visibility filters. If [param for_peer] is [code]0[/code] (the default), all peers' visibilties are updated.

members.name: DeltaInterval
members.summary: Time interval between delta synchronizations. Used when the replication is set to [constant SceneReplicationConfig.REPLICATION_MODE_ON_CHANGE]. If set to [code]0.0[/code] (the default), delta synchronizations happen every network process frame.

members.name: PublicVisibility
members.summary: Whether synchronization should be visible to all peers by default. See [method set_visibility_for] and [method add_visibility_filter] for ways of configuring fine-grained visibility options.

members.name: ReplicationConfig
members.summary: Resource containing which properties to synchronize.

members.name: ReplicationInterval
members.summary: Time interval between synchronizations. Used when the replication is set to [constant SceneReplicationConfig.REPLICATION_MODE_ALWAYS]. If set to [code]0.0[/code] (the default), synchronizations happen every network process frame.

members.name: RootPath
members.summary: Node path that replicated properties are relative to. If [member root_path] was spawned by a [MultiplayerSpawner], the node will be also be spawned and despawned based on this synchronizer visibility options.

members.name: VisibilityUpdateMode
members.summary: Specifies when visibility filters are updated.

signals.name: DeltaSynchronized
signals.summary: Emitted when a new delta synchronization state is received by this synchronizer after the properties have been updated.

signals.name: Synchronized
signals.summary: Emitted when a new synchronization state is received by this synchronizer after the properties have been updated.

signals.name: VisibilityChanged
signals.summary: Emitted when visibility of [param for_peer] is updated. See [method update_visibility].

values.name: VISIBILITY_PROCESS_IDLE
values.summary: Visibility filters are updated during process frames (see [constant Node.NOTIFICATION_INTERNAL_PROCESS]).

values.name: VISIBILITY_PROCESS_NONE
values.summary: Visibility filters are not updated automatically, and must be updated manually by calling [method update_visibility].

values.name: VISIBILITY_PROCESS_PHYSICS
values.summary: Visibility filters are updated during physics frames (see [constant Node.NOTIFICATION_INTERNAL_PHYSICS_PROCESS]).

constants.name: VISIBILITY_PROCESS_IDLE
constants.summary: Visibility filters are updated during process frames (see [constant Node.NOTIFICATION_INTERNAL_PROCESS]).

constants.name: VISIBILITY_PROCESS_PHYSICS
constants.summary: Visibility filters are updated during physics frames (see [constant Node.NOTIFICATION_INTERNAL_PHYSICS_PROCESS]).

constants.name: VISIBILITY_PROCESS_NONE
constants.summary: Visibility filters are not updated automatically, and must be updated manually by calling [method update_visibility].
